title: Iran Nuclear Talks Stalled Amid Lebanon Conflict
summary: Trump criticizes Iran's negotiation tactics as Israel intensifies military operations in Lebanon, raising concerns about regional stability.

title: Thune and Paxton Meet Amid Political Tensions
summary: Senator John Thune engages with Ken Paxton, signaling potential shifts in Republican party dynamics and alliances.

title: Longview Mill Disaster: Potential for Catastrophic Loss
summary: A major incident at a Longview paper mill could become Washington state's deadliest industrial tragedy, prompting safety reviews.

title: Biden Sues to Block Release of Sensitive Tapes
summary: The Biden administration is attempting to prevent the release of certain tapes, citing executive privilege and national security concerns.

title: Former Judges Call for Inquiry into Trump IRS Deal

title: Republican Candidate Navigates Party Challenges

title: Matthew Perry's Assistant Jailed in Ketamine Death Case
summary: Matthew Perry's assistant sentenced to 41 months for involvement in the actor's death, linked to ketamine use.

title: ICE Jail Hunger Strike: Protests Erupt in New Jersey

title: Vote on Trans Athlete Ban Canceled Due to Signature Issues
summary: A vote on a proposed ban on transgender athletes is canceled after irregularities are found in the submitted signatures.

title: Iran, US Draft Deal to Reopen Hormuz Shipping
summary: A draft agreement between Iran and the US aims to reopen the Strait of Hormuz and end a naval blockade, according to Iranian state TV.
